blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: England feel the heat with New Zealand in total control of third Test. Henry Nicholls finishes unbeaten on 119 as New Zealand end day three with a lead of 352, and still seven wickets in hand as they take complete control of the second Test against England at The Oval.
